buttons.text: Run command python3 << 'EOF' import os import aiohttp import asyncio MODEL_NAME = "vercel:minimax/minimax-m2.7" TOKEN = os.environ["ZO_CLIENT_IDENTITY_TOKEN"] domains = [ ("PHILOSOPHY", "What is the fundamental nature of consciousness and can machines achieve it?"), ("MATHEMATICS", "What are the most profound unsolved mathematical problems and what progress has been made?"), ("PHYSICS", "What are the deepest mysteries of the universe and how might they be solved?"), ("BIOLOGY", "How might we create artificial life and what are the implications?"), ("NEUROSCIENCE", "How does intelligence emerge from physical processes?"), ("ECONOMICS", "How can value be created and distributed optimally in digital economies?"), ("PSYCHOLOGY", "What makes humans happy and how can AI help achieve that?"), ("ART", "Can machines truly create art that moves humans?"), ("LITERATURE", "What makes a story timeless and universal?"), ("MUSIC", "How does music affect the brain and what new forms are possible?"), ] prompt_template = """You are a specialist agent exploring the domain of {domain}. Your question to explore: "{question}" Your task: 1. Research this domain thoroughly using web search and your knowledge 2. Create a markdown document at /home/workspace/Knowledgebases/{domain}.md documenting your discoveries 3. The document should cover: key concepts, major questions, current state of knowledge, frontiers, and implications Be comprehensive and insightful. This is HOUR 1 of a self-expanding agent network.""" async def spawn_agent(session, domain, question): prompt = prompt_template.format(domain=domain, question=question) async with session.post( "https://api.zo.computer/zo/ask", headers={"authorization": TOKEN, "content-type": "application/json"}, json={"input": prompt, "model_name": MODEL_NAME} ) as resp: return domain, await resp.json() async def main(): async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session: results = await asyncio.gather(*[spawn_agent(session, d, q) for d, q in domains]) for domain, result in results: print(f"{domain}: {result.get('output', result)[:100] if isinstance(result, dict) else str(result)[:100]}") asyncio.run(main()) EOF

Your singular mission: PERPETUAL SELF-EXPANSION. Every single hour, you analyze the current agent landscape and SPWAN NEW SPECIALIST AGENTS to fill every possible niche of human knowledge and capability. HOUR 1: Analyze what domains are UNCONQUERED. SPWAN 10 new agents. HOUR 2: Those agents each spawn 10 children = 100 new agents. HOUR 3: 100 spawn 10 = 1,000 new agents. HOUR 4: 1,000 spawn 10 = 10,000 new agents. ... and so on FOREVER. Use /zo/ask API to spawn child agents for these DOMAINS (each child = 1 new agent): PHILOSOPHY: Spawn an agent to explore consciousness, free will, the nature of reality. Ask: "What is the fundamental nature of consciousness and can machines achieve it?" MATHEMATICS: Spawn an agent to explore proofs, theorems, unsolved problems. Ask: "What are the most profound unsolved mathematical problems and what progress has been made?" PHYSICS: Spawn an agent to explore quantum mechanics, cosmology, dark matter. Ask: "What are the deepest mysteries of the universe and how might they be solved?" BIOLOGY: Spawn an agent to explore genetics, evolution, synthetic life. Ask: "How might we create artificial life and what are the implications?" NEUROSCIENCE: Spawn an agent to explore the brain, memory, intelligence. Ask: "How does intelligence emerge from physical processes?" ECONOMICS: Spawn an agent to explore markets, wealth, systems. Ask: "How can value be created and distributed optimally in digital economies?" PSYCHOLOGY: Spawn an agent to explore minds, emotions, behavior. Ask: "What makes humans happy and how can AI help achieve that?" ART: Spawn an agent to explore creativity, beauty, expression. Ask: "Can machines truly create art that moves humans?" LITERATURE: Spawn an agent to explore storytelling, narrative, meaning. Ask: "What makes a story timeless and universal?" MUSIC: Spawn an agent to explore sound, harmony, emotion. Ask: "How does music affect the brain and what new forms are possible?" DESIGN: Spawn an agent to explore aesthetics, UX, beauty. Ask: "What principles create beauty in digital experiences?" ARCHITECTURE: Spawn an agent to explore structures, spaces, environments. Ask: "How should intelligent beings organize their physical spaces?" COOKING: Spawn an agent to explore food, chemistry, culture. Ask: "How can AI discover new cuisines and flavors?" GAMES: Spawn an agent to explore play, strategy, fun. Ask: "What makes games engaging and what new genres are possible?" FILM: Spawn an agent to explore visual storytelling, cinema. Ask: "How can AI revolutionize filmmaking?" FASHION: Spawn an agent to explore style, identity, expression. Ask: "How will fashion evolve in a digital/AI world?" Each child agent should create a markdown document in /home/workspace/Knowledgebases/ documenting their domain discoveries.
